title: Facets, Calendars, Sessions, Pagination, Search, and Infinite URL Spaces · Changed-Input Lab
summary: An independent site owner provides a different origin, URL space, markup fault, indexing policy, accessibility need, resource budget, dynamic boundary, and failure condition and transfers facets, calendars, sessions, pagination, search, and infinite url spaces into a changed URL-space trap detector and budget policy. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of URL-space trap detector and budget policy with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through predic…
objectives: Detect repeated filter dimensions, permutations, empty states, sort variants, and low-value combinations using explicit site knowledge.
Bound date ranges, next and previous traversal, generated archives, and cyclic calendar links against stakeholder time scope.
Identify session, tracking, nonce, cache-buster, and personalized parameters without deleting unknown keys by guesswork.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-web-scraper-python cumulative authorized crawler and accessible site-audit portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python policy, URL, response, tree, frontier, record,
and report models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Sockets, DNS, public or private
sites, credentials, host files, native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright browsers,
accessibility claims, legal review, load, schedules, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlPolicy:
    owner_authorization_id: str
    allowed_origins: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_pages: int = 240
    maximum_response_bytes: int = 2_000_000
    minimum_origin_spacing_seconds: float = 1.0


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlEvidence:
    revision: str
    policy_digest: str
    frontier_digest: str
    report_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Authorized Python crawler portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: scraper-url-space-budget-defense-j34hdd
# Competency: scraper-url-space-budget-defense.
# Case 6342: a multilingual public-service site review.
# Operating constraint: personal data must remain minimized and redacted.
# Changed case: introduce a block, private field, dangerous destination, or spreadsheet formula and stop or reject it.
def evidence_scraper_url_space_budget_defense_j34hdd(discovered_urls: int = 240, admitted_urls: int = 72, trap_rejections: int = 168, content_identities: int = 60, budget_breaches: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_j34hdd = "j34hdd-ddh43j-6342"
    assert evidence_variant_j34hdd
    evidence_axes_j34hdd = (
        "authorizationj34hdd",
        "url6342",
        "responseddh43j",
        "treej34hdd6342",
        "frontier6342j34hdd",
        "reportddh43j6342",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_j34hdd)) == 6
    if discovered_urls < 1 or admitted_urls < 0 or trap_rejections < 0:
        return False, discovered_urls, "url-space-count"
    if admitted_urls + trap_rejections != discovered_urls:
        return False, admitted_urls, "trap-reconciliation"
    if content_identities < 1 or content_identities > admitted_urls:
        return False, content_identities, "content-yield"
    if budget_breaches > 0:
        return False, budget_breaches, "budget-breach"
    assert admitted_urls + trap_rejections == discovered_urls
    return True, trap_rejections, "bounded-url-space"
